message.content:
@startuml
participant "PackageManager" as PM1
participant "ApplicationPackageManager" as PM2
participant "PackageManagerService" as PM3
participant "ActivityIntentResolver" as AR1
participant "IntentResolver" as IR1

participant "PackageManager" as PM4
participant "ApplicationPackageManager" as PM5
participant "PackageManagerService" as PM6
participant "ActivityIntentResolver" as AR2
participant "IntentResolver" as IR2

PM1 ..> PM4
PM2 ..> PM5
PM3 ..> PM6
AR1 ..> AR2
IR1 ..> IR2

PM1 --> PM4 : queryIntentActivities
PM4 --> PM5 : queryIntentActivitiesAsUser
PM5 --> PM6 : queryIntentActivities
PM6 --> AR1 : queryIntent
AR1 --> AR2 : queryIntent
AR2 --> IR1 : queryIntent
IR1 --> IR2 : queryIntent

PM1 ..> PM4 : queryIntentActivities
PM4 ..> PM5 : queryIntentActivitiesAsUser
PM5 ..> PM6 : queryIntentActivities
PM6 ..> AR1 : queryIntent
AR1 ..> AR2 : queryIntent
AR2 ..> IR1 : queryIntent
IR1 ..> IR2 : queryIntent

@enduml
